_comment: Snippet to merge into your ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json. Agents are auto-discovered from agents/*.md via frontmatter (including the `tools:` field) — do NOT add them to any `agent` block (causes ConfigInvalidError). Only add AGENTS.md to instructions. Valid OpenCode permission keys are read / edit / bash / task / skill; `write` and `agent` are NOT valid keys.
